prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, predict the structure of Spike glycoprotein (P0DTC2) from Severe acute respiratory syndrome coronavirus 2 using ColabFold. outline the prediction methodology, confidence assessment strategy, multi-state modeling considerations, and validation plan. Provide guidance on validation approaches and experimental follow-up.
